title: callicarpa pentandra f. surigaensis
intro: Callicarpa pentandra f. surigaensis, also known as the purple callicarpa, is a plant species that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to the Philippines. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Callicarpa pentandra f. surigaensis include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory tract infections, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to extract its active compounds and harness its medicinal properties.
